title: Simple Sprint Display HUD
description: Sprint state is displayed in a highly customizable, sprint display/HUD.
body:
Features:
Toggleable sprint display HUD to show sprint state without having to restart sprint.

Commands:
/sprint

```
format <%status% / &&> : Customise the format of the hud, using %status% and && to represent colour codes.
move <x,y> : Moves the gui to a certain position on the screen
toggleHud : Toggles the gui on/off
toggleModeDisplay : Toggles whether or not to distinguish between toggled on and key being held.
```
REQUIRES FABRIC API!

![Sprint displayed on and toggled in the hud](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72f80cd0053b22a702b31a2c19b788e00912bd1e.webp)
